tata-punch-ev.name: Tata Punch EV
tata-punch-ev.description: Compact electric SUV with a modern cabin, city-friendly dimensions, and a practical everyday driving range.

mahindra-xuv-3xo.name: Mahindra XUV 3XO
mahindra-xuv-3xo.description: Feature-rich compact SUV with turbocharged performance, a panoramic skyroof, and a well-equipped interior.

maruti-suzuki-fronx.name: Maruti Suzuki Fronx
maruti-suzuki-fronx.description: Stylish crossover with efficient petrol engines, elevated ground clearance, and a connected infotainment system.

hyundai-venue.name: Hyundai Venue
hyundai-venue.description: Connected compact SUV with contemporary styling, multiple engine choices, and a feature-packed cabin.

royal-enfield-classic-350.name: Royal Enfield Classic 350
royal-enfield-classic-350.description: Timeless retro motorcycle with relaxed ergonomics, a refined engine, and an unmistakable road presence.
